channel.title: Mohammed Tawfeq Amiri — Blog
channel.description: Thoughts, insights, and tutorials on web development, software engineering, and technology.

item.title: Zone.js in Angular: Deep Dive into Its Evolution (Angular 16–19)
item.description: Explore how Angular has evolved its change detection mechanism from Zone.js dependency to Signal-based reactivity across Angular 16–19.

item.title: Revolutionize Your Responsive Web Design Testing with Responsively
item.description: Effortlessly test your website on multiple devices and resolutions with Responsively — an open-source Electron-based browser with dev tools, click/scroll mirroring & batch screenshot export.
